highlights.description: LEVER Capability Framework - a five-stage progression model synthesizing classical learning frameworks for the AI era
Go-first type system with JSON Schema generation and TypeScript/Zod exports
Mappings to 5 classical frameworks: Bloom's Taxonomy, Dreyfus Model, Shu-Ha-Ri, Apprenticeship, Conscious Competence

added.description: Core LEVER stage types: Learn, Execute, Value, Enable, Replicate
Classical framework definitions with stage-by-stage mappings
Bidirectional LEVER-to-framework mapping system with MappingTable
Domain profile types for role-specific LEVER interpretations
Complete LEVER specification type combining all components
Reference profiles: Product Builder and Software Engineer
JSON Schema generation from Go types via invopop/jsonschema
Embedded schema support via `//go:embed` for programmatic access
Zod schemas with runtime validation and type inference
Stage progression constants: personal (L-E-V) vs leveraged (E-R)
Output progression mapping: Knowledge → Work → Outcomes → People → Systems

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, and API reference
Project CLAUDE.md with Go-first workflow documentation
MkDocs site with Material theme and ProductBuildersHQ styling
Stage documentation pages for all 5 LEVER stages
Framework mapping documentation with cross-reference tables
Domain profile guides for Product Builder and Software Engineer
Usage guides for Go library, TypeScript/Zod, and CLI
Ecosystem integration guide for PBMM, ASDM, PRISM

tests.description: Comprehensive tests for lever package: stages, frameworks, mappings, profiles, spec

build.description: Go module configuration with invopop/jsonschema dependency
MkDocs configuration with ProductBuildersHQ unified theme
